description: Legal document. Ketubba for Sitt al-K__ and __ haLevi. The grooms early payment (muqaddam) is 30 dinars. [NB: this document previously was mistakenly conflated with T-S 20.48 [PGPID 7513] because the two are cited in the same footnote in Med. Soc. III] RR
description_he: מסמך משפטי. כתובה לסת אל-כ__ ו__ הלוי. תשלום מוקדם של החתן (מוקדם) הוא 30 דינרים
